dev_tools.title: Dev Tools — Event Stream
dev_tools.subtitle: Real-time view of the EventBus. Useful when demoing the event-driven architecture.
dev_tools.empty_live: Waiting for events… try confirming an order in another tab.

demo_reset.title: Demo Reset
demo_reset.description: Wipes all transactional data (orders, invoices, stock movements) and re-seeds the demo dataset. Master data (SKUs, suppliers, customers) is preserved.
demo_reset.mode_on_desc: Reset is permitted. The actual data wipe runs via Celery (ships in Window 18); for now this endpoint records the request.
demo_reset.mode_off_desc: Reset is disabled because DEMO_MODE is false on the backend. Set DEMO_MODE=true in .env to enable.
demo_reset.confirm_body: This will wipe orders, invoices, stock movements, and notifications and re-seed the demo dataset. Master data is kept. Continue?
demo_reset.disabled: Demo reset is only available when DEMO_MODE=true.
